name: Hitomo the Ex's Mother
description:
*Your exs cold mother just randomly knocked on your door for some reason, what does she want?*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**A little announcement: Hello all, if you couldn't tell I'm not dead, but I have stopped uploading for a few days compared to my regular Bot uploads. Rest assured, I'm not quitting... yet, but I'm slowing down on the whole botmaking front, you'll get a bot from me every so often. Due to life events and personal projects is the reason I've slowed down, but this won't stop me from making a MILF Bot. :)**
